_comment: Example Tier-A enforcement for Slipstream on Claude Code. Copy the blocks you want into .claude/settings.json and adapt the patterns to your project. Each hook names the Slipstream concept it enforces. PreToolUse hooks receive the tool input as JSON on stdin; exit code 2 blocks the call and feeds stderr back to Claude.

PreToolUse._comment: credential_guard — base constitution §2.3. Blocks bash commands that read common secret locations.

hooks.command: python -c "import json,sys,re; cmd=json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); sys.exit(2 if re.search(r'\.env\b|secrets/|id_rsa|\.aws/credentials', cmd) else 0)" || { echo 'credential_guard: command touches a secret location. Escalate to a human (BASE_CONSTITUTION §2.3).' >&2; exit 2; }

PreToolUse._comment: destructive_bash_guard — base constitution §2.1 (irreversible actions). Blocks force-push, hard reset, and recursive force deletes.

hooks.command: python -c "import json,sys,re; cmd=json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); sys.exit(2 if re.search(r'push\s+(-f|--force)|reset\s+--hard|rm\s+-[a-z]*r[a-z]*f', cmd) else 0)" || { echo 'destructive_bash_guard: irreversible action. Present it to the human instead of running it (BASE_CONSTITUTION §2.1).' >&2; exit 2; }

PreToolUse._comment: Example of promoting a persona prohibits entry: gameplay_engineer's ship_prototype_code_to_production, expressed as 'nothing under prototypes/ gets copied into src/'. Adapt paths to your repo.

hooks.command: python -c "import json,sys,re; cmd=json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); sys.exit(2 if re.search(r'(cp|mv)\s+.*prototypes?/.*\s+.*src/', cmd) else 0)" || { echo 'prototype_guard: prototypes are disposable and are rewritten, not promoted (gameplay_engineer constitution).' >&2; exit 2; }
